issue_title: fix(meta): add missing `hid` to icon tags
issue_body_preview:
The favicon head links were pushed without `hid` and `name` and they weren't deduplicated in `mergeMeta`: https://github.com/nuxt-community/pwa-module/blob/245aadc3c3111c1eff0bf18ff775bb248a708867/lib/meta.utils.js#L13-L19
As a result they were appended every time the page was visited, causing a me
test_description_zh: 在 Nuxt PWA 应用中，多次导航访问页面（如从首页跳转到其他页面再返回首页），然后检查页面 <head> 中 favicon 相关的 <link> 标签数量，观察是否存在重复的 icon link 标签。
expected_result_zh: 无论页面被访问多少次，<head> 中的 favicon link 标签应始终保持唯一，不会出现重复的 icon 标签累积追加的情况。
